rationales.cleanser: Removes oil and buildup so treatments absorb effectively.
rationales.bha: Beta hydroxy acids clear congested pores to calm breakouts.
rationales.vitc: Vitamin C brightens dull, uneven tone for a fresher look.
rationales.hydrating: Boosts moisture reserves to keep your barrier supple.
rationales.rich: Seals in hydration with a cushioning, barrier-strengthening cream.
rationales.spf: Shields skin from daily UV exposure—apply every morning.
